subject: Triangulation of GRB030715 (single large error box)
body:
S. Golenetskii, E. Mazets, V. Pal'shin, and D. Frederiks on behalf
of Konus-Wind and Helicon/Coronas-F teams,

T. Cline, on behalf of the Konus GRB team,

Konus - Wind also observed this burst (GCN 2300)
at 15950.855 s UT.  Analysis shows
that the first error box has the correct ecliptic latitude.
(with ERROR BOX CENTER:   6 h 51 m 21.55 s    -13 o 20 '   5.65 ")
